product_updates.title: US Army announces contract with Anduril worth up to $20B
product_updates.content: The Army described this as a single enterprise contract consolidating more than 120 separate "procurement actions."

product_updates.title: Meta reportedly considering layoffs that could affect 20% of the company
product_updates.content: These layoffs could help Facebook's parent company offset its aggressive spending on AI infrastructure, as well as AI-related acquisitions and hiring.

product_updates.title: How to use the new ChatGPT app integrations, including DoorDash, Spotify, Uber, and others
product_updates.content: Learn how to use Spotify, Canva, Figma, Expedia, and other apps directly in ChatGPT.

product_updates.title: ‘Not built right the first time’ — Musk’s xAI is starting over again, again
product_updates.content: The AI lab is revamping its effort to build an AI coding tool, with two new executives joining from Cursor.

product_updates.title: Lawyer behind AI psychosis cases warns of mass casualty risks
product_updates.content: AI chatbots have been linked to suicides for years. Now one lawyer says they are showing up in mass casualty cases too, and the technology is moving faster than the safeguards.
